app.name: Descope CLI
app.one_liner: A command line tool for managing your Descope project

screens.name: Main CLI Interface
screens.purpose: Entry point for executing Descope management commands
primary_actions: Manage users, tenants, and access keys

rust_commands.name: audit_logs
rust_commands.purpose: Search and display audit logs for projects

rust_commands.name: json_output
rust_commands.purpose: Supports JSON output for easy integration into scripts and CI/CD workflows

rust_commands.name: manage_entities
rust_commands.purpose: Create and modify project entities such as users, tenants and access keys

rust_commands.name: snapshot_workflow
rust_commands.purpose: Manage project settings and configurations using snapshots that can be exported, validated and imported into other projects

mvp_plan: week 1: Ensure JSON output support for all commands
week 1: Implement core entity management commands (users, tenants, access keys)
week 1: Integrate audit log search capability
acceptance_tests: Confirm that project configurations can be exported as snapshots and imported into another project
Ensure all commands support structured JSON output for CI/CD integration
Validate that audit logs are searchable and displayed correctly
Verify that users, tenants, and access keys can be created and modified via CLI commands
